entry_point.FQNAME: com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.hue.usecase.HueRuleUseCase java.lang.Object findApplicableRules(com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.shift.ShiftMatch shift, java.time.LocalTime currentTime, kotlin.coroutines.Continuation<? super kotlin.Result<? extends java.util.List<? extends com.github.f1rlefanz.cf_alarmfortimeoffice.hue.data.HueScheduleRule>>> $completion)

problem.problem_class: Redundant curly braces in string template
